## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the change and related context.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes: #[issue number]

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] CI/CD enhancement
- [ ] Documentation update

## ✅ Testing

Describe the testing done:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Code formats correctly: `./gradlew spotlessApply`
- [ ] All tests pass: `./gradlew test`
- [ ] Code quality checks pass: `./gradlew lint`
- [ ] CI/CD workflow passes

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

If this adds UI changes, please add screenshots.

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated
- [ ] Code comments added
- [ ] Inline documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CI/CD documentation updated (if applicable)

## ⚠️ Breaking Changes

Any breaking changes to the CI/CD or build process?

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

Any special instructions for deployment or release?

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] All CI/CD workflows pass
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials in code

## 🎯 Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `./gradlew test`
- [ ] Code is formatted: `./gradlew spotlessCheck`
- [ ] Lint passes: `./gradlew lint`
- [ ] APK builds: `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline is green on GitHub
